title: normalize_tract_classifications_v1 — promote staging_tract_classifications_v0 → tract_classifications_v1
description: Validates POST /api/actions when type='normalize_tract_classifications'. Reads a previously-captured staging_tract_classifications_v0 envelope (by layer_id), maps its rows to the canonical ngsTracts column set (per METHODOLOGY.md §5.1), type-coerces, and emits a typed tract_classifications_v1 envelope. Lineage preserved via provenance.source_layer_ids. Mirrors the relatedness atlas's normalize_relatedness pattern.

source_layer_id.description: layer_id of the staging_tract_classifications_v0 envelope to promote.

source_layer_ids.description: Optional alias for multi-source converters; single-source actions use source_layer_id.

column_map.description: Maps source column names (as they appear in the staging payload's rows) to canonical tract_classifications_v1 names. Defaults match the ngsTracts METHODOLOGY §5.1 spec verbatim — only override if your producer uses different column names.
